---
title: "KD-GAT Progress Update"
subtitle: "CAN Bus Intrusion Detection via Knowledge Distillation"
author: "Robert Frenken"
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

## Agenda

-   Codebase reorganization
-   Preprocessing & feature engineering
-   Training logic & architecture changes
-   Quarto reports & interactive dashboard
-   Hugging Face Spaces
-   Next steps

# Codebase Reorganization

## `graphids/` Namespace Consolidation

Consolidated **55 files** under a single `graphids/` package with enforced 3-layer hierarchy:

| Layer    | Directory            | Responsibility                     |
|----------|----------------------|------------------------------------|
| Config   | `graphids/config/`   | Pydantic schemas, YAML, constants  |
| Pipeline | `graphids/pipeline/` | CLI, orchestration, export, stages |
| Core     | `graphids/core/`     | Models, preprocessing, training    |

-   Import boundaries **enforced by tests** (`test_layer_boundaries.py`)
-   Scripts organized: `slurm/`, `data/`, `profiling/`, `dev/`
-   Notebooks split: `analysis/` vs `prototyping/`

## New Pipeline Infrastructure

-   **Sweep pipeline CLI**: 3-stage HP optimization DAG (Ray Tune + Optuna + ASHA)
-   **Loss landscape stage**: visualize loss surface around trained checkpoints
-   **Smart data staging**: NFS → Scratch → TMPDIR with marker-based invalidation
-   **SLURM account migration**: PAS3209 → PAS1266
-   **Debug scripts**: smoke tests, loss decomposition, LR range tests

# Preprocessing & Feature Engineering

## Node Features: 11-D → 26-D

**15 new features** added based on CAN IDS literature review:

| Category       | Count | Features                           |
|----------------|-------|------------------------------------|
| Per-byte stds  | 8     | `Byte0_Std` ... `Byte7_Std`        |
| Entropy        | 1     | Shannon entropy (Aljabri 2025)     |
| Change rates   | 2     | Mean + max payload mutation rate   |
| Higher moments | 2     | Skewness, kurtosis (clamped ±10)   |
| Graph topology | 2     | Clustering coeff, split-half ratio |

## Edge Features & Versioning

**11-D edge features** capture temporal and structural relationships:

-   Count, frequency, interval stats, regularity
-   Temporal span, bidirectionality
-   Degree product and ratio

**Automatic cache invalidation:**

-   `PREPROCESSING_VERSION = "2.2.0"` — bumped on any graph construction change
-   `include_attack_type=True` now default — per-graph and per-node labels
-   Graph-level `id_entropy` attribute for anomaly characterization

# Training Logic & Architecture

## GATv2 Upgrade

-   Switched all configs from `conv_type: "gat"` to `conv_type: "gatv2"`
-   **Key difference:** GATv2 uses edge features (`edge_dim=11`) in message passing
-   Standard GAT ignores edge attributes entirely
-   Added `proj_dim` config field for optional pre-attention projection

::: aside
Brody et al. 2022 — "How Attentive are Graph Attention Networks?"
:::

## DQN Fusion Vectorization

Rewrote DQN training from per-sample Python loops to **vectorized PyTorch ops**:

-   **\~55x speedup** — eliminated \~10M Python iterations per run
-   Replay buffer, Q-values, and target updates all operate on batched tensors
-   `dqn.py`: 110 → 772 LOC (cleaner separation of concerns)

## Model Construction Fix

-   All sites now use `Model.from_config(cfg, ...)` — never manual `Model(param1=...)`
-   Prevents silent divergence when config fields are added
-   VGAE decoder: added feature normalization for stable reconstruction loss

# Reports & Dashboard

## Quarto Website

Migrated from Astro to **Quarto website** with 4 sections:

| Section    | Content                                    |
|------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Dashboard  | 8-page interactive dashboard (DuckDB-WASM) |
| Paper      | 10 chapters with Mosaic/vgplot figures     |
| Slides     | RevealJS presentations                     |
| Playground | SQL console + chart builder                |

-   Auto-deploys via **GitHub Actions** on push to main
-   CI pipeline: lint → test → quarto build → deploy (Pages + HF)

## Dashboard: 8 Interactive Pages

| Page                   | What It Shows                              |
|------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Overview               | Leaderboard, model comparison, run history |
| Performance            | Per-dataset metrics                        |
| Training               | Loss curves, LR schedules                  |
| GAT & DQN              | Attention weights, DQN policy              |
| Knowledge Distillation | KD transfer analysis                       |
| Graph Structure        | Force graph (7 color modes), statistics    |
| Datasets               | Dataset catalog                            |
| Staging                | Pipeline staging area                      |

## Paper Figures: Declarative Mosaic Specs

6 figures migrated from imperative OJS to **declarative JSON specs**:

-   Attention heatmap, CKA similarity, DQN policy
-   Reconstruction errors, UMAP embeddings (GAT + VGAE)
-   Graph statistics boxplot (new)

Rendered by generic `mosaic-renderer.js` using `@uwdata/mosaic-spec`:

```
parseSpec(jsonObj) → astToDOM(ast) → live DOM with DuckDB-WASM
```

## Graph Visualization

-   **Force-directed graph** with 7 color modes:
    -   Label, attack type, degree, entropy, clustering, community, anomaly score
-   **Edge tooltips** showing all 11-D features on hover
-   **Statistical analysis** (`graph-analysis.js`, 324 LOC):
    -   Client-side distributions, correlations, summaries

# Hugging Face Spaces

## Deployed Spaces

| Space | Type | Purpose |
|-----------------------|--------------------|-----------------------------|
| `buckeyeguy/kd-gat-report` | Static HTML | Quarto site mirror (from CI) |
| `buckeyeguy/kd-gat-sweep-dashboard` | Streamlit + Docker | HP sweep results (4 tabs) |
| `buckeyeguy/osc-usage-dashboard` | Streamlit + Docker | OSC allocation monitoring |

## Sweep Dashboard Data Flow

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Ray Tune] --> B[sweep_export]
    B --> C[sweeps.parquet]
    C --> D[HF Dataset]
    D --> E[Dashboard]
```

-   Auto-ingested after each `run_tune()` call
-   4 tabs: Overview, Parallel Coords, HP Sensitivity, Raw Trials

# Next Steps

## Immediate

-   Full **pipeline retrain** on rebuilt caches (26-D features, GATv2)
-   Run test suite on SLURM to verify no regressions
-   **Fusion method comparison**: DQN vs MLP vs Weighted Average
    -   Open question: is RL justified for what is effectively a contextual bandit?

## Short Term

-   **Loss landscape analysis** on retrained models
-   Evaluate research questions R1--R3 with new feature set
-   Fix DQN training reward bug
-   Populate sweep dashboard with real HP sweep data

## Medium Term

-   Paper draft completion with updated experimental results
-   Ablation study: contribution of each new feature group
-   Edge deployment benchmarking (small KD-compressed models)

## Questions?

Thank you.

**Contact:** frenken.2\@osu.edu
